# Abiola Babatunde

> Product designer, UI/UX designer, software developer, and Webflow developer based in Lagos, Nigeria. I help startups ship product design, website design, mobile apps, and engineering from strategy to launch.

## Selected case studies

- [Aṣá Ọ̀rọ̀ — Yoruba word game (Flutter)](https://www.abiolababatunde.com/work/asa-oro)
- [Muzora — campus music discovery app](https://www.abiolababatunde.com/work/muzora)
- [Dart Agro Systems — AgriTech website](https://www.abiolababatunde.com/work/dart-agro-systems)
- [Shight Running Club — community platform](https://www.abiolababatunde.com/work/shight-running-club)
- [CryptoDispensers — fintech website redesign](https://www.abiolababatunde.com/work/crypto-dispensers)

## Services

Product design, UI/UX design, software development, website design, Webflow development, WordPress development, Flutter mobile apps, design systems, and AI product development.
